title: Buyer short-closes a PO line because supplier can't deliver the rest
user_persona: Buyer closing out a line that won't be fully delivered

conversation.user: On PO-2026-805, line 3 we ordered 100 units but supplier can only deliver the 60 already received. Short-close the rest.

ground_truth.status_after: Open or Closed depending on other lines

writes.status_after: Open or Closed depending on other lines
